# Valar

Valar is a local speech stack for Apple Silicon with a CLI, a loopback daemon, and an MCP bridge.

Start here:
- README.md
- docs/prerequisites-and-expectations.md
- docs/working-models.md
- docs/model-quickstart.md

Useful follow-up docs:
- docs/faq.md
- docs/use-cases.md
- docs/integrations.md
- SECURITY.md
- PRIVACY.md
